SubItem.Comment: The output power is derated due to input power condition.

SubItem.Name: Uptime
SubItem.Comment: Uptime since last power cycle.

SubItem.Name: Turn On Counter
SubItem.Comment: Overall turn on cycles of the power supply.

SubItem.Name: Warning
SubItem.Comment:
"Warning" is set when: - The electronic fuse is switching on - The electronic fuse is tripped
This bit is Self-acknowledging

SubItem.Name: Error
SubItem.Comment:
"Error" is set when: - The electronic fuse tripped despite the auto retry sequence - A watchdog error has occurred
The error can be reseted by generation a rising edge at the "Reset" bit.

SubItem.Name: Tripped
SubItem.Comment: The electronic fuse has tripped

SubItem.Name: Enabled
SubItem.Comment: The electronic fuse is switched on and output voltage is applied

SubItem.Name: Current
SubItem.Comment: Current in amperes flowing through the electronic fuse

SubItem.Name: Warning
SubItem.Comment: Collective warning Possible causes: Measured "Input Voltage"(6pp0:12) is lower than "Min Input Voltage Warning Threshold"(8pp0:12) Measured "Input Voltage"(6pp0:12) is greater than "Max Input Voltage Warning Threshold"(8pp0:13) Measured "Input Current"(6pp0:13) is greater than "Max Input Current Warning Threshold"(8pp0:14)

SubItem.Name: Voltage
SubItem.Comment: Input voltage in V

SubItem.Name: Current
SubItem.Comment: Input current in A

SubItem.Name: Enable
SubItem.Comment: Activates the electronic fuse. Only becomes active if the process data output "Control via Process Data" is set.

SubItem.Name: Control via Process Data
SubItem.Comment: Activates the control of the process data output "Enable"

SubItem.Name: Reset
SubItem.Comment: Acknowledge errors with rising edge

SubItem.Name: Default State
SubItem.Comment: Output state when Control via process data is disabled: 0x00:Enabled 0x01:Disabled

SubItem.Name: Watchdog State
SubItem.Comment: Output state after watchdog error: 0x00:Enabled 0x01:Disabled 0x02:Last State 0x03:Error State

SubItem.Name: Auto Retry Count
SubItem.Comment: Number of retries after the fuse has tripped

SubItem.Name: Auto Retry Interval
SubItem.Comment: Time between retries

SubItem.Name: Current Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Current Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Error Delay Time
SubItem.Comment: Time in ms until the electronic fuse gets disabled when an error occurrs

SubItem.Name: Max Input Voltage Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: If the measured input "Voltage"(6pp0:12) is lower than the "Min Input Voltage Warning Threshold", the "Warning"(6pp0:01) is going to be set

SubItem.Name: Min Input Voltage Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: If the measured input "Voltage"(6pp0:12) is greater than the "Max Input Voltage Warning Threshold", the "Warning"(6pp0:01) is going to be set

SubItem.Name: Max Input Current Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: If the measured input "Current"(6pp0:13) is greater than the "Max Input Current Warning Threshold", the "Warning"(6pp0:01) is going to be set

SubItem.Name: Voltage Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for voltage measurement

SubItem.Name: Voltage Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for voltage measurement

SubItem.Name: Current Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Current Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Error
SubItem.Comment: General error for the complete device

SubItem.Name: Warning
SubItem.Comment: General warning for the complete device

SubItem.Name: Overtemperature Warning
SubItem.Comment: Device temperature warning is active

SubItem.Name: PCB Temperature Warning Threshold
SubItem.Comment: Device temperature warning threshold

SubItem.Name: Temperature
SubItem.Comment: Device temperature

Device.Name: MS8491-0000-1112 Brake chopper module, 24 V DC, external resistor, M12
MS8491-0000-1112 Brems-Chopper-Modul, 24 V DC, externer Widerstand, M12

SubItem.Name: Brake Resistor Overload Factor at 1% Duty Cycle
Brake Resistor Overload Factor at 1% Duty Cycle

Device.Name: MS8491-0000-1122 Brake chopper module, 48 V DC, external resistor, M12
MS8491-0000-1122 Brems-Chopper-Modul, 48 V DC, externer Widerstand, M12

SubItem.Name: Brake Resistor Overload Factor at 1% Duty Cycle
Brake Resistor Overload Factor at 1% Duty Cycle

Device.Name: MS9100-2020-2209 Empty module, 24 V DC fused, digital I/Os
MS9100-2020-2209 Leergehäuse, 24 V DC abgesichert, digital I/Os

SubItem.Name: Input
SubItem.Comment: Input value

SubItem.Name: Wirebreak
SubItem.Comment: Minimum current is not reached

SubItem.Name: Power Supply Missing
SubItem.Comment: Input status is unknown, because the needed power supply is missing.

SubItem.Name: Overcurrent
SubItem.Comment: Output is drawing too much current

SubItem.Name: Overload
SubItem.Comment: Output is in thermal overload and switched off

SubItem.Name: Short to 24V
SubItem.Comment: Voltage is detected in off state

SubItem.Name: Power Supply Missing
SubItem.Comment: Output is switched on.Ths could be prevented by external circumstances like missing power supply.

SubItem.Name: Warning
SubItem.Comment:
"Warning" is set when: - The electronic fuse is switching on - The electronic fuse is tripped
This bit is Self-acknowledging

SubItem.Name: Error
SubItem.Comment:
"Error" is set when: - The electronic fuse tripped despite the auto retry sequence - A watchdog error has occurred
The error can be reseted by generation a rising edge at the "Reset" bit.

SubItem.Name: Tripped
SubItem.Comment: The electronic fuse has tripped

SubItem.Name: Enabled
SubItem.Comment: The electronic fuse is switched on and output voltage is applied

SubItem.Name: Current
SubItem.Comment: Current in amperes flowing through the electronic fuse

SubItem.Name: Output
SubItem.Comment: Output value of the digital output

SubItem.Name: Enable
SubItem.Comment: Activates the electronic fuse. Only becomes active if the process data output "Control Via Process Data" is set.

SubItem.Name: Control via Process Data
SubItem.Comment: Activates the control of the process data output "Enable"

SubItem.Name: Reset
SubItem.Comment: Acknowledge errors with rising edge

SubItem.Name: Enable Wirebreak
SubItem.Comment: Enable wirebreak detection

SubItem.Name: Enable Filter
SubItem.Comment: Enable filter with configured filter time in subindex 17

SubItem.Name: Filter Time
SubItem.Comment: Defines filter time(sw filter) when enabled with subindex 2

SubItem.Name: Detect Short to 24V
SubItem.Comment: Enable short detection to supply

SubItem.Name: Use Output as Power Supply
SubItem.Comment: The output is switched on all the time, independend from process data and safe state

SubItem.Name: Safe State Behavior
SubItem.Comment: Defines the behaviour of the output in EtherCAT states below OP

SubItem.Name: Default State
SubItem.Comment: Output state when control via process data is disabled: 0x00:Enabled 0x01:Disabled

SubItem.Name: Watchdog State
SubItem.Comment: Output state after watchdog error: 0x00:Enabled 0x01:Disabled 0x02:Last State 0x03:Error State

SubItem.Name: Auto Retry Count
SubItem.Comment: Number of retries after the fuse has tripped

SubItem.Name: Auto Retry Interval
SubItem.Comment: Time between retries

SubItem.Name: Current Logger Sampling Rate
SubItem.Comment: Time between two measurements

SubItem.Name: Current Calibration Offset
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration offset for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Current Calibration Gain
SubItem.Comment: Vendor calibration gain for current measurement

SubItem.Name: Error Delay Time
SubItem.Comment: Time in ms until the electronic fuse gets disabled when an error occurrs

DiagMessage.MessageText: Output %d back in normal operating range
Input %d back in normal operating range
Elektronische Sicherung hat ausgelöst. Wiederanlauf wird durchgeführt
Electronic fuse has tripped. Auto-Retry performed
Elektronische Sicherung schaltet in den sicheren Zustand aufgrund eines Feldbusausfalls
Electronic fuse switches to SafeSate due to watchdog error
Output %d is shortet to power supply
Elektronische Sicherung schaltet aus, aufgrund eines Feldbusausfalls
Electronic fuse switches off due to watchdog error
Elektronische Sicherung schaltet aus, aufgrund eines internen Fehlers
Electronic fuse switches off due to an internal error
